context: squamous cell carcinoma (80%), lymphoma, adenocarcinoma, adenoid cystic carcinoma ◊  Most common cause of orbital infection! Origin:   from ethmoid sinuses (in children), from frontal sinus (in adolescence) √  preseptal / orbital edema / cellulitis √  subperiosteal / orbital abscess √  mucormycosis (in diabetics) destroys bone and extends into cavernous sinus Cx:
